title: Hyperreal Diorama Cube
description: A Prompt Atlas theme for hyperreal cutaway cubes that compress surface worlds, geology, roots, water, fossils, and hidden chambers into one structured object.

en.title: Hyperreal Diorama Cube
en.description: A Prompt Atlas theme for hyperreal cutaway cubes that compress surface worlds, geology, roots, water, fossils, and hidden chambers into one structured object.

zh-CN.title: Hyperreal Diorama Cube · 剖面立方
zh-CN.description: 剖面立方主题：把顶面场景与四侧地层、树根、含水层、化石、熔岩腔等信息压缩成一个高真实度立方体。
